name: Blueberry Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw blueberries if they were frozen; do not drain them.
2. For the topping, in a medium mixing bowl stir together granola, coconut flakes, and shortening. Set aside.
3. For the filling, in a large mixing bowl stir together blueberries and their juices, sugar, lemon juice, and cinnamon. Transfer the mixture to an ungreased 10-inch x 6-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
4. Sprinkle the topping over the filling.
5. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 30 to 40 minutes or until the topping is crisp. Serve warm. Makes 6 servings.
